title: actinostemon glabrescens var. acuminatus
intro: Actinostemon glabrescens var. acuminatus, also known as the 'thorny fan palm,' is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Actinostemon glabrescens var. acuminatus are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices.
